---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Caspar Leung"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
# Read the file skipping the first 2 rows
df <- read.csv("multiTimeline.csv", skip = 2, header = TRUE)

# Rename columns for easier coding
colnames(df) <- c("Timestamp", "Interest")

# Check the first few rows
head(df)
```



```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
